NUM_DATA 30
NUM_LOGICAL 1
# CUDA-QX trt_decoder surface_code_decoder.onnx focused test inputs.
# `SHOT_BITS` is LSB-first: the first character is detector bit 0.
SHOT_BITS 000000000000000000000000
SHOT_BITS 100000000000000000000000
SHOT_BITS 010000000000000000000000
SHOT_BITS 001000000000000000000000
SHOT_BITS 000100000000000000000000
SHOT_BITS 000010000000000000000000
SHOT_BITS 000001000000000000000000
SHOT_BITS 000000100000000000000000
SHOT_BITS 000000010000000000000000
SHOT_BITS 000000001000000000000000
SHOT_BITS 000000000100000000000000
SHOT_BITS 000000000010000000000000
SHOT_BITS 000000000001000000000000
SHOT_BITS 000000000000100000000000
SHOT_BITS 000000000000010000000000
SHOT_BITS 000000000000001000000000
SHOT_BITS 000000000000000100000000
SHOT_BITS 000000000000000010000000
SHOT_BITS 000000000000000001000000
SHOT_BITS 000000000000000000100000
SHOT_BITS 000000000000000000010000
SHOT_BITS 000000000000000000001000
SHOT_BITS 000000000000000000000100
SHOT_BITS 000000000000000000000010
SHOT_BITS 000000000000000000000001
SHOT_BITS 100001000000000000000000
SHOT_BITS 000100000001000000000000
SHOT_BITS 000000010000000000010000
SHOT_BITS 000000000000100000001000
SHOT_BITS 001000000000000000000001
